paper.title: Generalizable Pareto-Optimal Offloading with Reinforcement Learning in Mobile Edge Computing
paper.abstract: Mobile edge computing (MEC) is essential for next-generation mobile network applications that prioritize various performance metrics, including delays and energy efficiency. However, conventional single-objective scheduling solutions cannot be directly applied to practical systems in which the preferences (i.e., the weights of different objectives) are often unknown or challenging to specify in advance. In this study, we formulate a multi-objective offloading problem for MEC with multiple edges

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
